name: Ablaze
hint: Burning: ongoing damage and panic-style checks are resolved with your group’s fire rules.

name: Bleeding
hint: Uncontrolled blood loss over time—use your rulebook’s bleeding steps between rounds.

name: Blinded
hint: Vision heavily impaired: ranged and observation suffer until the condition ends.

name: Broken
hint: Morale collapse: may flee, hide, or refuse to fight until rallied—see social/fear rules.

name: Charmed
hint: Pulled to favour the charmer: judgement and loyalties skew—combat, commands, and tests use your book.

name: Deafened
hint: Hearing impaired: orders and awareness at distance can fail until it clears.

name: Encumbered
hint: Burdened by gear or wounds: movement and sometimes tests are harder than usual.

name: Entangled
hint: Caught in nets, vines, or grapples: movement and freedom of action are restricted.

name: Fatigued
hint: Tired from exertion: stamina and focus suffer until you rest or recover.

name: Fear
hint: Dread in play: terror checks, fight-or-flight, and when you must flee or freeze—your book is the source.

name: Poisoned
hint: Toxin in the body: damage or debuffs may tick—follow the poison’s profile in play.

name: Prone
hint: On the ground: melee and movement work differently; standing usually costs an action.

name: Restrained
hint: Pinned, tied, or grappled: arms or legs may be limited; breaking free and attacks follow your book.

name: Stunned
hint: Dazed or reeling: fewer or worse actions until the stun wears off.

name: Surprised
hint: Caught off-guard: your group’s surprise rules set who acts when before normal initiative.

name: Unconscious
hint: Out cold: no voluntary actions until revived; very vulnerable in combat.
